text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP allows machines to grasp the meaning behind text. For example, it powers translation tools that convert sentences from one language to another while keeping the original sense. It also enables sentiment analysis, which identifies whether a piece of writing is positive, negative, or neutral. This is useful for businesses analyzing customer feedback. Additionally, NLP makes chatbots possible, allowing them to have natural conversations with users. Overall, NLP makes communication between humans and technology smoother and more intuitive.
